summary: Organization Webhooks feature testing completed. Backend: 15/15 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All E2E tests passed - Webhooks tab visible for admins, create modal works with 11 event type checkboxes, webhook list shows status/events/deliveries, all action buttons (Test, Edit, Toggle, Rotate Secret, Delete) functional, delivery log shows HTTP status codes and attempt counts.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (carried over from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks/events returns all 11 supported event types with key, label, category
Good: POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks creates webhook with URL, events, description and returns full secret
Good: URL validation rejects non-http URLs (400)
Good: Empty events validation rejects empty array (400)
Good: Invalid events validation rejects unknown event types (400)
Good: Max 10 webhooks per org limit enforced (400)
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks lists webhooks with secrets masked (first 6 + ... + last 4 chars)
Good: PUT /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks/{id} updates URL, events, is_active, description
Good: DELETE /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks/{id} removes webhook and its deliveries
Good: POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks/{id}/test sends test.ping event to webhook URL
Good: POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks/{id}/rotate-secret generates new secret and returns it
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/webhooks/{id}/deliveries returns delivery log with status, response_status, attempts
Good: Only admins/owners can manage webhooks (403 for regular members)
Good: RBAC role.created action fires webhook to subscribed endpoints
Good: Webhook delivery uses HMAC-SHA256 signing with X-Webhook-Signature header
Good: 3 retry attempts with exponential backoff for failed deliveries
Good: Frontend Webhooks tab is permission-gated by org:settings
Good: Create webhook modal has URL input, description input, and 11 event checkboxes organized by category
Good: Event categories: Documents (2), Members (3), RBAC (2), Workflows (2), Vault (1), Authentication (1)
Good: Webhook list shows status indicator (green=active), URL, event count, last delivery status badge
Good: Expanded webhook shows subscribed event tags, masked secret, created date
Good: All action buttons present: Test, Edit, Disable/Enable, Rotate Secret, Delete
Good: Delivery log shows event type (test.ping, role.created), HTTP status code, attempt count

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all webhook UI features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed webhooks and roles during testing (cleaned up after tests). One webhook exists pointing to https://httpbin.org/post with role.created and member.joined events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Organization Webhooks feature fully working. 11 event types supported: document.notarized, document.uploaded, member.joined, member.removed, member.invited, role.assigned, role.created, approval.created, approval.decided, vault.uploaded, sso.login. Webhooks are org-scoped with max 10 per org. Delivery uses httpx with 10s timeout, 3 retry attempts, exponential backoff. Payload signed with HMAC-SHA256. Frontend Webhooks tab at /organizations shows list with expand/collapse for details, actions, and delivery log. Test webhook sends test.ping event.
